title: lappula tianschanica
intro: Lappula tianschanica, also known as the Kyrgyz chamomile or silkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lappula tianschanica include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting a good night's sleep. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
